subcodes.first_line: Say: This is the Utterance of God, and verily it is His sword which no scabbard hath beheld from all eternity, by the life of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل هذا بیان الله و انه لهو سیفه الذی لم یره الغمد فی ازل الازال لعمر الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @martyrs and martyrdom
